title: EvaluateResponse
description: Wire response returned by POST /v1-evaluate. A DENY is NOT an HTTP error; it is a permitted=false body.

permitted.description: true iff the policy engine allowed the action. SDKs map this to decision = ALLOW | DENY.

decision_id.description: Opaque permit identifier. Passed back in POST /v1-verify-permit as decision_id.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation from the policy engine. May be empty on ALLOW.

audit_hash.description: Hash-chained audit-trail entry (21 CFR Part 11 / GxP).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the decision. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.
